title: Northeastern Acadia (New Brunswick) - Canada.ca
content:
## Northeastern Acadia New Brunswick

## Northeastern Acadia New Brunswick
The Acadian Peninsula, including Caraquet, Rivière-du-Nord and Hautes-Terres , is a territory vibrating with Acadian culture, bathed by the sea and surrounded by exceptional natural landscapes. Known for its historical heritage and French language, this region is a centre of tourist attractions and a meeting place for communities. This dynamic and welcoming region offers a lifestyle rich in traditions and opportunities to flourish.
Where is Northeastern Acadia?
